items.label: Provider Holdout
items.blocking_reason: Submission exists but fails the ledger submission contract.
items.submitted_by: Codex operator using DeepSeek official API
intake_errors: attestation.ledger_reviewer_approved must be true for a real submission
attestation.ledger_reviewed_at must use YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ
attestation.ledger_reviewer must be different from submitted_by
attestation.ledger_reviewed_at must be at or after submitted_at

source_checklist.label: Provider model run
source_checklist.next_action: Run provider-backed output-exec with real credentials.

source_checklist.label: Timing observed
source_checklist.next_action: Provider execution should record timing metadata.

source_checklist.label: Token usage observed
source_checklist.next_action: Provider execution should return non-estimated token usage.

success_checks: reports/skill_os2_audit.json item provider-holdout status becomes pass
privacy_contract: Do not commit provider credentials or environment dumps.
The output execution report records output hashes and aggregate run metadata, not raw provider prompts.
items.next_action: Run provider-backed holdout cases with real credentials and commit only aggregate evidence.

items.label: Human Adjudication
items.blocking_reason: No evidence packet has been submitted for review.

source_checklist.label: Review pairs exist
source_checklist.next_action: Generate the blind A/B review pack.

source_checklist.label: No pending decisions
source_checklist.next_action: Record a reviewer choice and reason for every pair.

source_checklist.label: Judgments complete
source_checklist.next_action: Every pair needs one valid human judgment.

source_checklist.label: Reviewer metadata
source_checklist.next_action: Record reviewer and reviewed_at before adjudication can count.

source_checklist.label: Reason required
source_checklist.next_action: Keep reason mandatory for every imported or direct reviewer decision.

source_checklist.label: Blind review attested
source_checklist.next_action: Set reviewer_attestation only after choices are completed before opening the answer key.

source_checklist.label: Raw content attested
source_checklist.next_action: Attest that reviewer decisions exclude raw prompts, outputs, transcripts, messages, and private user content.

source_checklist.label: Raw content blocked
source_checklist.next_action: Adjudication evidence should store prompt hashes and reviewer metadata, not raw prompts, outputs, transcripts, or messages.

source_checklist.label: Human evidence ready
source_checklist.next_action: Complete all reviewer decisions with metadata and rationale, plus blind-review attestation and integrity fingerprints.

success_checks: reports/output_review_adjudication.json review_integrity.blind_pack_sha256 exists and matches reports/output_review_decisions.json
reports/output_review_adjudication.json pairs and reviewer_checklist store prompt_sha256, not raw prompt text
reports/skill_os2_audit.json item human-adjudication status becomes pass
privacy_contract: Reviewer decisions should not include raw user data or private customer detail.
Reviewer reasons must be rubric-based and must not include raw user data or private customer detail.
The decision importer rejects raw prompt, output, transcript, message, and answer-key fields.
The adjudication evidence stores prompt_sha256 instead of raw prompt text.
The decision and adjudication artifacts preserve blind_pack_sha256 so reviewers can audit exactly which pack was judged.
Keep the answer key separate until after decisions are recorded.
items.next_action: Record real A/B choices, reviewer metadata, and blind-review attestation, then regenerate adjudication.

items.label: Native Permission Enforcement
items.blocking_reason: No evidence packet has been submitted for review.

source_checklist.label: Native enforcement
source_checklist.next_action: Collect real target-client or external runtime guard proof.

source_checklist.label: Probe failures
source_checklist.next_action: Runtime permission probes must stay clean.

source_checklist.label: Installer support
source_checklist.next_action: Installer enforcement is supporting evidence, not native proof.

success_checks: reports/runtime_permission_probes.json summary.installer_enforcement_pass_count records local installer enforcement but does not replace native evidence
reports/skill_os2_audit.json item native-permission-enforcement status becomes pass
privacy_contract: Do not mark native_enforcement true for metadata-only fallbacks.
Keep residual risks visible for targets that still rely on operator enforcement.
items.next_action: Integrate a real target-client or external installer runtime guard before claiming native permission enforcement.

items.label: Native Client Telemetry
items.blocking_reason: No evidence packet has been submitted for review.

source_checklist.label: External events
source_checklist.next_action: Import at least one metadata-only event from a real client.

source_checklist.label: Adoption sample
source_checklist.next_action: Telemetry must include adoption outcome evidence.

success_checks: reports/skill_os2_audit.json item native-client-telemetry status becomes pass
privacy_contract: Telemetry must remain metadata-only and local-first.
Do not package reports/telemetry_events.jsonl or any raw prompt, output, transcript, note, or message field.
items.next_action: Install a real client against the native host and import production metadata-only events.
